title: Fix monthly due/credit consistency, client reference uniqueness UX, and client table totals row

requirements.summary: Make Dashboard "Due (completed appointments; current month)" always match the Monthly Listing total "Negative Credit" for the same month by sharing identical month selection inputs and credit logic.
acceptanceCriteria: When the Monthly Listing for February displays a total Negative Credit of 0, the Dashboard "Due (completed appointments; current month)" card displays 0 for February as well.
Dashboard due computation uses the same month selection and the same underlying credit logic as the Monthly Listing totals (no divergence between components).
No regressions: the Dashboard due card remains consistent with the Monthly Listing totals for all other months when navigating/refreshing.

file_operations.description: Refactor/shared-helper the "total negative credit" aggregation used by both Dashboard and MonthlyListingTable so the Dashboard due amount can be derived from the same underlying calculation path (including prior-month carryover dependency).

Update the Dashboard "Dus" card computation to consume the same shared Monthly Listing negative-credit calculation helper and ensure it is driven by the same year/month inputs as the listing data used for that month (no parallel/duplicate logic).

requirements.summary: Correct Monthly Listing "Previous month credit" carryover so each month’s carryover equals the immediately preceding month’s ending credit/balance, consistently for all months (including March onward and January→December rollover when available).
acceptanceCriteria: For any displayed month M, each client row’s "Previous month credit" equals the same client’s ending credit/balance from month M-1.
March’s "Previous month credit" values match February’s ending credit/balance values for the same clients.
This carryover remains correct for all months (April uses March, etc.), including January using December of the previous year when available.

file_operations.description: Fix getPreviousMonthCredit to use the correct prior-month ending credit/balance field from the prior month listing data (aligning with what the UI displays as the prior month’s ending credit), with safe fallback behavior when prior-month data is missing.

Ensure the table’s "Crédit du mois précédent" column and any dependent credit totals (positive/negative) use the corrected carryover logic from monthlyListing utilities, keeping displayed values consistent month-to-month. Use the shadcn-ui Table components already in use; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Align the data wiring for previous-month listing inputs passed into the MonthlyListingTable and used in Dashboard-level monthly computations so carryover remains correct when navigating months and when computing the current-month cards.

requirements.summary: Prevent saving when a client reference is already used (client creation and appointment creation flows) and show a clear validation error in the UI.
acceptanceCriteria: Attempting to create a client with a referenceClient that already exists for the same signed-in user is rejected (backend validation) and the UI shows an error.

Attempting to create an appointment using a client reference that conflicts with an existing client reference rule is rejected according to the same uniqueness policy (backend validation) and the UI shows an error.
Uniqueness is enforced server-side (cannot be bypassed via direct calls).
The existing behavior that prevents changing a client reference after creation remains unchanged.

file_operations.description: Add a client-side uniqueness pre-check during new client creation (not edit) against the currently loaded client list; block submit and display a clear toast validation error when the reference is already in use. Keep existing behavior that disables reference editing once a client exists.

Add validation to detect ambiguous/duplicated client references in the loaded client list and prevent appointment creation/edit submission when the selected/typed reference is not uniquely resolvable; display a clear toast error indicating the reference is already used/duplicated. Use existing shadcn-ui form controls and dialog components already present; verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Harden error handling for client and appointment create mutations by mapping backend uniqueness validation failures to a stable, user-friendly error message that the UI can present (without changing authentication behavior).

requirements.summary: Add a totals row under the Client Database table headers showing the grand total of "Paid this year" for all currently displayed clients.
acceptanceCriteria: A totals row is visible immediately under the column headers in the client list table.
The totals row displays the correct sum of "Paid this year" across all clients currently shown in the table (respecting any active sorting/filtering that affects which rows are displayed).
The total updates correctly when clients/appointments data changes (e.g., after adding/editing appointments or clients).

file_operations.description: Compute a memoized grand total of the "Payé cette année" values for the currently displayed client rows (sortedClients) and render a totals row directly beneath the column headers using the existing shadcn-ui Table components. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
